devices.limitReached: You've reached your plan's limit of {count, plural, one {# active device} other {# active devices}}. New devices can't be registered or re-enabled.
devices.limitApproaching: You're using {active} of {limit} active devices included in your plan.
devices.addDialogDesc: Register a new device by scanning the QR code or pasting the API key.
devices.addStep1: Download the Wablast SMS app from <link>our download link</link>, install it, and grant SMS permissions.
devices.addStep2: Tap Continue to create a new API key and get a QR code in the next dialog. If you already have an active API key, you can paste it in the app instead.
devices.addStep3: Open the Wablast SMS app and scan the QR code or paste the key manually. Your device should appear in the list when the link succeeds.
devices.removeDescNamed: This removes {name} from your account. You will not be able to send or receive SMS through it until you register the app again.
devices.removeDesc: This removes the device from your account. You will not be able to send or receive SMS through it until you register the app again.

apiKey.createDesc: By clicking generate, you will be able to view your API key. Make sure to save it before closing the modal as you will not be able to view it again.
apiKey.yourKeyDesc: Use this API key to connect your device or authenticate your service.
apiKey.forDeviceDesc: Open the Wablast SMS app and scan the QR code, or manually enter the API key in the app and click register/update.
apiKey.noAppDesc: Download the APK from <link>our download link</link> and install it.
apiKey.forExternalDesc: Copy the API key and store it securely for authenticating your external service with Wablast SMS.
apiKey.importantDesc: Once you close this modal, you will not be able to view your API key again. Make sure to save it before closing.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.revokedDesc: These keys no longer work. You can remove them from your account to tidy your list.
apiKeys.removeDesc: This removes the key from your account permanently. It is already revoked and cannot be used. This cannot be undone.
apiKeys.renameDesc: Enter a new name for your API key.
apiKeys.revokeSrDesc: Revoking stops this key from working everywhere it is used.
apiKeys.revokeWarning: Revoking immediately stops this key from working everywhere it is still used—apps, servers, scripts, devices, and other integrations. Create a new API key first if you need one, then update every place the old key is stored and reconnect or reconfigure anything that depends on it.

download.loadError: Failed to load releases. Please try again later.
download.title: Download Wablast SMS App
download.subtitle: Transform your Android device into a powerful SMS gateway with our easy-to-use application.
download.noReleasesNow: No releases available at this time.
download.req2: SMS capability on the Android device
download.req4: Battery optimization disabled for background operation (recommended)

apiGuide.sendSmsDesc: Send SMS messages to one or more recipients
apiGuide.getSmsDesc: Retrieve details and status of a specific SMS message
apiGuide.getBatchDesc: Retrieve details and status of a batch of SMS messages
apiGuide.docSubtitle: Integrate SMS capabilities into your applications
apiGuide.moreDetails: For more details, see the full API documentation.

bulkSms.csvEmpty: CSV file is empty or invalid
bulkSms.title: Send Bulk SMS
bulkSms.subtitle: Upload a CSV, configure your message, and send bulk SMS in 3 simple steps.
bulkSms.step1Desc: Upload a CSV file (max {bytes} bytes, {maxRows} rows) containing recipient information.
bulkSms.dropzone: Drag & drop a CSV file here, or click to select one
bulkSms.maxInfo: Max file size: {bytes} bytes, Max rows: {maxRows}
bulkSms.step2Desc: Select the recipient column and create your message template.
bulkSms.templatePlaceholder: Enter your message template here. Use '{{' column_name '}}' for dynamic content.
bulkSms.step3Desc: Preview your message for a selected recipient before sending.

messaging.pageSubtitle: Send messages and view your SMS history
messaging.title: Send SMS
messaging.subtitle: Send a message to any recipient(s)

verify_email.label: Verify your email
verify_email.description: Required before you can send SMS.

download_app.label: Download the Android app
download_app.description: Install Wablast SMS on your Android device.

api_key.label: Generate an API key
api_key.description: Used to connect your device or authenticate API calls.

register_device.label: Register your device
register_device.description: Link your phone to your account by scanning a QR code.

choose_plan.label: Choose your plan
choose_plan.description: Pick the plan that fits your usage.

first_message.label: Send your first message
first_message.description: Send your first message from the dashboard.

dialog.title: Register your device
dialog.desc: Follow these steps to link your phone to your account.
dialog.s1: Generate an API key in the step above (if you have not already).
dialog.s2: Download the Wablast SMS Android app from <link>our download link</link>.
dialog.s3: Open the app and grant SMS permissions when prompted.
dialog.s4: In the app, register your device by scanning the QR code shown when you generate an API key, or paste the key manually.
dialog.s5: Your phone should appear under Registered Devices on this dashboard when the link succeeds.

account.pwMin: Password must be at least 8 characters long
account.pwResetHint: If you signed in with Google, you can reset your password <link>here</link>.
account.delWarning: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. This action permanently removes all your data, cancels subscriptions, and revokes access to all services.
account.delConfirmQuestion: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action:
account.delPoint2: Will permanently delete all your data
account.delPoint4: Will remove access to all services
account.delEmailConfirm: Please type your email address to confirm:
account.delEmailWrong: Please enter your correct email address
account.delReasonRequired: Please enter a reason for deletion
account.delFailed: Failed to submit account deletion request

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.subtitle: Manage webhook notifications for your SMS events. You can configure up to {max} webhooks.
webhooks.reachedLimit: You have reached the maximum of {max} webhooks. Delete one to add a new one.
webhooks.noneDesc: Add a webhook endpoint to receive real-time notifications for SMS events. You can add multiple endpoints for different services.
webhooks.deleteConfirmNamed: Are you sure you want to delete "{label}"?
webhooks.deleteConfirmGeneric: Are you sure you want to delete this webhook?
webhooks.deleteConfirmTail: New events will no longer be delivered to this endpoint. Past delivery history will be preserved.
webhooks.formNameMax: Name must be 64 characters or fewer
webhooks.createDialogDesc: Configure your webhook endpoint to receive real-time SMS notifications.
webhooks.nameDesc: A short label to help you tell your webhooks apart
webhooks.urlDesc: The URL where webhook notifications will be sent via POST requests
webhooks.secretDesc: Used to verify webhook payload authenticity
webhooks.eventsDesc: Choose the events you want to receive notifications for

contribute.title: Support Wablast SMS
contribute.subtitle: Your contribution, whether financial or through code, helps keep this project alive and growing.
contribute.financialDesc: Help sustain Wablast SMS's development through financial contributions
contribute.monthlyDesc: Become a patron and support us monthly
contribute.codeDesc: Help improve Wablast SMS by contributing to the codebase
contribute.starDesc: Show your support by starring the repository
contribute.reportDesc: Help us improve by reporting bugs and suggesting features
contribute.joinDesc: Follow our socials and connect with other contributors to get early access to new features and updates.

community.title: Community
community.subtitle: Connect with other users and find support

communityLinks.linkCopiedDesc: The Link has been copied to your clipboard.
communityLinks.githubDesc: Check out our source code and contribute to the project.
communityLinks.discordDesc: Join our community for support and updates.
communityLinks.twitterDesc: Follow us on X for the latest updates and announcements.
communityLinks.linkedinDesc: Connect with us on LinkedIn for updates and news.
communityLinks.spreadDesc: Help others discover Wablast SMS by sharing it with your network.
communityLinks.shareDesc: Help us grow by sharing Wablast SMS with your friends and colleagues!

rateLimit.reached: You have reached your usage limit.
rateLimit.orWait: or wait for your limit to reset

accountDeletion.cancelHint: If you would like to cancel this request, please email

pastDue.message: Your subscription payment failed and your account is past due. Update your payment method to avoid losing access.

verifyEmailAlert.cta: Verify your email to keep your service running smoothly.

msgHistory.replyDesc: Send a reply message to this sender.
msgHistory.followUpDesc: Send a follow-up message to this recipient.
msgHistory.smsDetailsDesc: Detailed information about this SMS message.

whDocs.deliveryIntro: When a new SMS is received or SMS status is updated, we'll send a POST request to your webhook URL with the event data. Your endpoint should:
whDocs.reqAck: Return a 2XX status code to acknowledge receipt
whDocs.retryInfo: If we don't receive a successful response, we'll retry the delivery at increasing intervals: 3 minutes, 5 minutes, 30 minutes, 1 hour, 6 hours, 1 day, 3 days, 7 days, 30 days.

updateApp.title: You are using an older version of the Wablast SMS mobile app
updateApp.desc: is ready for an update. Install version {version} to get improved reliability, bug fixes, and more.
updateApp.highlightsDesc: Improved reliability, bug fixes, and more.
updateApp.recommendedDesc: Download the latest Android app build and update your device.

subscription.planUpdatedDesc: Your subscription has been updated to the new plan.

accountPage.title: Account
accountPage.subtitle: Manage your account settings and preferences
accountPage.getSupportDesc: Contact our support team for assistance
accountPage.deleteAccountFullDesc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data
accountPage.pwSecurityDesc: Change your password to keep your account secure
accountPage.contactSupportDesc: Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
